result.stderr:
OSK.UML.CommandLine 0.2.0+82949ce566e36ff16eacb2945b9c6f836b3e4279
Copyright (C) 2026 BlankDev117

  -p, --path               Required. Specifies the path to a file or directory
                           to be parsed.

  --fileTypes              (Default: .cs) Filter for the types of files that
                           will be included in the uml diagram.

  -d, --directoryDepth     (Default: 1) How deep should the generator look for
                           files, within a directory, when creating the UML.

  -n, --name               (Default: domainModel) The name of the output file
                           that will be generated for the UML diagram.

  -o, --outputDirectory    (Default: .) Sets the output path to use for the
                           exported uml diagram.

  -v, --verbose            (Default: false) Enable verbose logging.

  --plantUmlPath           Override the path location for the plant uml jar file
                           that will be used to create UML diagrams.

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

staticCommands.name: generate
staticCommands.description: Generates a UML diagram based on the provided options and target.

options.description: Specifies the path to a file or directory to be parsed.
How deep should the generator look for files, within a directory, when creating the UML.
Filter for the types of files that will be included in the uml diagram.
The name of the output file that will be generated for the UML diagram.
Sets the output path to use for the exported uml diagram.
Override the path location for the plant uml jar file that will be used to create UML diagrams.
